overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from a sheltered homeless encampment under an overpass, crosses a busy street with other pedestrians, walks along a steam-filled sidewalk with towering holographic advertisements, and ascends a concrete stairway between high-rise buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered area with makeshift tents and homeless shelters

notable_agents.action: standing near a camouflage tent observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large curved concrete structure forming a roof overhead
bright orange camping tent with belongings scattered around
military-style camouflage tent with storage containers
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: Walking through a sheltered homeless encampment beneath a massive concrete overpass. Makeshift tents and shelters line the sides of the walkway, with striped concrete barriers visible ahead. The area is dimly lit with mixed natural and artificial light filtering through.

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit street
crosses yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing a wide street with other pedestrians dressed in bright neon clothing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright neon green shorts and pink top walking ahead
pedestrian in blue top and purple leggings walking in same direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
orange metal barriers lining the street edge
large floating digital advertisement displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered encampment into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection. The player crosses a prominent yellow-striped crosswalk alongside pedestrians in vibrant neon attire, with orange traffic barriers lining the street and holographic advertisements visible on nearby buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with steam vents and holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to view a massive tower with large holographic display

agents.ego_description: walking down a city street lined with steam vents and towering digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt and dark pants walking ahead
pedestrian in neon green shorts walking alongside

entered.detail: ground vent emitting thick white steam into the air
massive skyscraper with teal and orange facade and giant holographic face advertisement
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling city sidewalk covered in colorful graffiti, with steam vents releasing white plumes into the air. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive tower featuring a giant holographic face advertisement, while an elevated highway ramp passes overhead and palm trees line the street.

events.description: approaches concrete stairway leading upward between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward a concrete stairway at the end of the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: long concrete staircase ascending between high-rise buildings
blue and white automated vending machine
colorful spray-painted graffiti covering the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: Continuing down a narrower street section with vibrant graffiti covering the pavement. A vending machine sits against the left wall as the path approaches a long concrete stairway ascending between towering buildings, with a pedestrian already climbing ahead.

agents.ego_description: climbing a long concrete stairway upward between towering buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian continuing to ascend stairs ahead of player

entered.detail: metal pipe handrail along the right side of stairs
smooth concrete walls of adjacent buildings

segments.scene_description: Ascending a long concrete stairway flanked by metal handrails and smooth concrete walls of adjacent buildings. The space is more enclosed and dimly lit compared to the open street below, with the stairway continuing upward between the high-rise structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban slum into the blinding light of a neon metropolis, eventually ascending into a narrow concrete canyon. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving through a dimly lit encampment of makeshift tents and striped barriers. As the camera emerges from the shadows into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the player crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk among pedestrians in vibrant attire. The movement then shifts toward a bustling sidewalk filled with colorful graffiti and plumes of steam, tilting upward to reveal a towering holographic face and an elevated highway ramp. Finally, the path narrows past a vending machine and turns toward a long concrete stairway, climbing between towering high-rise buildings into a more enclosed and dimly lit space.
